scripts.fresh: npm run db:migrate -w packages/api && docker exec mix-match-redis-1 redis-cli FLUSHALL && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/api && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.publish:web: VITE_API_URL=https://mix-match-production.up.railway.app/api npm run build -w packages/shared && VITE_API_URL=https://mix-match-production.up.railway.app/api npm run build -w packages/web && mkdir -p packages/web/dist/.vercel && echo '{"projectId":"prj_Y1Vtcr7mDdMwW0DSrycxwP8CNsst","orgId":"team_vuiGIsRwkz4yC7DwVUvhmkKM"}' > packages/web/dist/.vercel/project.json && cd packages/web/dist && vercel --prod --yes
